No Poverty.reason: The course content focuses on mathematical theory and applications in general economics/business, with no explicit or inferable connection to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course syllabus contains no explicit or inferable content related to food security, nutrition, sustainable agriculture, or food systems.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course mentions 'exponential growth and decay' but does not explicitly or implicitly link it to health, disease modeling, or any other aspect of well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a required university calculus course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and aims to cultivate professional skills for application in various fields (Target 4.4).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly covers 'applications in economics and business' and 'marginal analysis,' which are direct tools for understanding and improving economic productivity and growth (Target 8.2).
